LALALA3ED_1.korean: - 다음날 나는 의문의 저장 데이터를 확인하고자, 이레이나의 도움을 받아 그 게임을 다시 플레이 했다.
LALALA3ED_1.english: The next day, I wanted to check the mysterious save data, so I replayed the game with Ireina's help.

LALALA3ED_2.korean:
《저장 데이터 1》
《저장 날짜 : 2XXX - XX - XX》
《플레이어 : 용사 이레이나》
LALALA3ED_2.english:
《Save Data 1》
《Save Date: 2XXX - XX - XX》
《Player: Hero Ireina》

LALALA3ED_3.english: 《Do you want to load the selected data?>》

LALALA3ED_7.korean: 작업 메뉴 아이콘, 테스트용 재화, 더미 데이터 장비…
LALALA3ED_7.english: Work menu icon, test goods, dummy data equipment…

LALALA3ED_9.english: In that case, the owner of the account is indeed Epsilon…

LALALA3ED_10.korean: 응? 이건 개발 진척 주석? 엡실론이 적은 건가?
LALALA3ED_10.english: Huh? Is this a development progress comment? Did epsilon write too little?

LALALA3ED_11.korean:
X월 XX일
예레나의 생일 선물로 게임을 제작하기로 했습니다.
LALALA3ED_11.english: I decided to make a game as a birthday gift for Ireina on X month XX day.

LALALA3ED_12.korean:
생일까지는 약 4개월, 장르는... 본인은 RPG가 좋겠다고 하는 군요.
비밀로 할 생각이었는데… 정말 눈치가 빠른 아이입니다.
LALALA3ED_12.english: There are about four months left until her birthday, and as for the genre… she said she'd like an RPG. I was planning to keep it a secret… she's such a quick‑witted kid.

LALALA3ED_13.korean:
X월 X일
대사 창과 선택지 UI를 구현했습니다.
LALALA3ED_13.english: I implemented the dialogue window and choice UI for X Month X Day.

LALALA3ED_14.korean: 예레나가 '선택지가 너무 딱딱하면 내가 고른 느낌이 안 난다'고 해서, 선택지 마다 예레나의 말 버릇을 넣어 봤는데 의외로 나쁘지 않은 것 같군요.
LALALA3ED_14.english: Ireina said, “If the options are too stiff, it doesn’t feel like I chose them,” so I tried adding her mannerisms to each option, and surprisingly, it doesn’t feel too bad.

LALALA3ED_15.korean:
X월 XX일
오늘은 필드 맵을 구축했습니다.
LALALA3ED_15.english: Today, on Month XX, I built a field map.

LALALA3ED_16.korean: 미니맵을 넣을지 말지 고민. 예레나는 '길을 잃는 것도 재미인데, 너무 친절하면 좋지 않다고 조언을 해주었습니다. 그렇다면 지나온 길 정도는 알 수 있게 발자국 정도는 남겨야 겠네요.
LALALA3ED_16.english: I was debating whether or not to include a minimap. Ireina advised me that “getting lost is part of the fun, so being too helpful isn’t good.” In that case, I guess I should leave some footprints so you can at least remember the path you’ve taken.

LALALA3ED_17.korean:
X월 XX일
오늘은 종합 테스트를 진행했습니다.
LALALA3ED_17.english: Today, on Month XX, we conducted a comprehensive test.

LALALA3ED_18.english: But… Ireina woke up too quickly.

LALALA3ED_19.korean:
난이도 조절은 적절하다고 생각했는데 너무 초심자 위주로 생각했던 모양입니다.
예레나에게 맞춰 좀 더 난이도를 올리는 게 좋겠습니다.
LALALA3ED_19.english: I thought the difficulty adjustment was appropriate, but it seems I was too focused on beginners. It would be better to raise the difficulty a bit to better suit Ireina.

LALALA3ED_20.korean: 예레나? 처음 듣는 이름인데, 과거에 엡실론과 함께 있던 인간인가?
LALALA3ED_20.english: Ireina? I've never heard that name before. Is she a human who was with Epsilon in the past?

LALALA3ED_21.korean:
X월 XX일
오늘은 2차 종합 테스트를 진행했습니다.
LALALA3ED_21.english: Today, on Month XX, we conducted the second comprehensive test.

LALALA3ED_22.korean:
그런데 자기 혼자 플레이하니 재미가 없었던 모양입니다.
저와 같이 플레이하고 싶다고 하는군요.
LALALA3ED_22.english: However, it seems he didn’t find playing alone fun. He says he wants to play with me.

LALALA3ED_23.korean:
예레나를 위해 만든 게임이었는데…
2인 플레이가 가능하도록 수정해야겠네요.
LALALA3ED_23.english: It was a game made for Ireina… I guess I’ll have to modify it to support two‑player.

LALALA3ED_24.korean:
X월 XX일
다행히 시간에 맞춰 제작이 끝날 것 같습니다.
LALALA3ED_24.english: Fortunately, it looks like production will be finished on time on Month XX.

LALALA3ED_25.korean: 생각보다 시간이 많이 남았군요. 한 달 이상이나 여유롭습니다.
LALALA3ED_25.english: There is much more time left than I thought. I have more than a month to spare.

LALALA3ED_26.korean: 이대로 끝내는 건 아쉬우니 예레나 몰래 특별한 엔딩을 넣으면 어떨까요?
LALALA3ED_26.english: It would be a shame to end it like this, so how about we add a special ending without Ireina knowing?

LALALA3ED_27.english: For the special ending… I guess that would be best…

LALALA3ED_28.korean: 전에 예레나가 게임에서 말했던 꽃들로 가득 채운 맵을 보여주면 좋겠네요.
LALALA3ED_28.english: It would be nice if you could show me the map filled with flowers that Ireina mentioned in the game before.

LALALA3ED_30.korean:
X월 XX일
오늘은… 예레나의 생일 전날입니다…
LALALA3ED_30.english: Today, Month XX, is… the day before Ireina’s birthday…

LALALA3ED_31.korean: 예레나의 담당의로부터 어젯밤부터 상태가 좋지 않다는 말을 전달받았습니다.
LALALA3ED_31.english: I was informed by Ireina's doctor that she has been feeling unwell since last night.

LALALA3ED_32.korean:
당장 골격을 교체하지 않으면 위험하다고 합니다.
하지만 원래 약했던 예레나의 몸이 버텨줄 수 있을 지 모르겠습니다.
LALALA3ED_32.english: They say it is dangerous if the skeleton is not replaced immediately. However, I am not sure if Ireina's body, which was weak to begin with, will be able to withstand it.

LALALA3ED_33.korean:
…분명 괜찮을 겁니다.
언제나 그래왔던 것처럼 활기찬 모습으로 돌아올 테니까요.
LALALA3ED_33.english: … It will definitely be fine. Because they will return full of energy, just as they always have.

LALALA3ED_34.korean: 아픔을 이겨내고 저와 함께 좋아하는 꽃이 가득한 꽃밭을 볼 수 있을 거라고 믿고 있습니다.
LALALA3ED_34.english: I believe that you will overcome the pain and be able to see a flower garden full of your favorite flowers with me.

LALALA3ED_35.english: Like the hero Ireina that the child likes.

LALALA3ED_36.english: That is the end of the note's record…

LALALA3ED_37.english: The fact that there is no content in the latter part is…

LALALA3ED_38.english: Yeah… it's just as the commander thinks.

LALALA3ED_42.korean: 뭐, 딱히 비밀로 하고 있었던 것도 아니고…
LALALA3ED_42.english: Well, it's not like I was keeping it a secret or anything…

LALALA3ED_43.korean: 설마 사령관이 이렇게 내 사적인 공간까지 몰래 들어와서 훔쳐볼 줄은 몰랐지만…
LALALA3ED_43.english: I never imagined the Commander would sneak into my private space and peek like this, but…

LALALA3ED_45.korean: 미안… 그리고 이레이나는 이번 일이랑 상관없어. 전부 내가 억지로 부탁한 거야.
LALALA3ED_45.english: I'm sorry… and Ireina has nothing to do with this. I forced her to do it all.

LALALA3ED_46.english: Hehehe… You're such a reliable older brother.

LALALA3ED_47.korean: 이레이나랑 사령관이 탐정 팀을 만들 줄이야…
LALALA3ED_47.english: I never thought Ireina and the Commander would form a detective team…

LALALA3ED_48.korean: 두 사람이 날 위해서 이런 행동을 했다는 것 쯤은 알고 있어.
LALALA3ED_48.english: I know that the two of them did this for me.

LALALA3ED_49.korean: 오히려 걱정하게 만든 내 잘못이라고 생각해.
LALALA3ED_49.english: I actually think it's my fault for making you worry.

LALALA3ED_50.english: I'm sorry, Commander. Thank you, Ireina.

LALALA3ED_51.korean: 그러면 최근 엡실론 네가 기운이 없어 보였던 이유는 역시…
LALALA3ED_51.english: So the reason you’ve been looking so tired lately is because…

LALALA3ED_52.english: Yeah, Ireina’s birthday is coming up soon.

LALALA3ED_54.english: It’s also the anniversary of Ireina’s death.

LALALA3ED_55.english: That child was naturally physically weak.

LALALA3ED_56.korean: 오리진 더스트도 잘 받지 않은 체질 때문에 치료도 쉽지 않았어.
LALALA3ED_56.english: Treatment wasn’t easy either, because my constitution didn’t handle Origin Dust well.

LALALA3ED_58.korean: 음… 분명 괜찮다고 말했는데. 역시 부끄러운 과거를 들킨 기분은 어쩔 수 없네.
LALALA3ED_58.english: I know I said it was fine, but I can’t help feeling like my embarrassing past has been exposed.

LALALA3ED_59.english: Anyway, if it felt like I was hiding something… I apologize.

LALALA3ED_60.korean: 며칠 뒤면 다시 평소처럼 돌아갈 테니까.
LALALA3ED_60.english: Things will go back to normal in a few days.

LALALA3ED_61.english: Let’s play games together again then, Commander.

LALALA3ED_63.korean: 완성한 이 게임을 다시 플레이 하진 않을 거야?

LALALA3ED_64.english: Isn’t there something you want to see?

LALALA3ED_68.english: Because there is no one to watch it with.

LALALA3ED_69.english: Demon King, did you wake up?

LALALA3ED_72.english: Come to think of it, I logged in directly from here…

LALALA3ED_73.korean: 그러고 보니 여기서 바로 접속 했었지…

LALALA3ED_74.english: There’s no need to apologize. Thanks for helping me, Ireina.

LALALA3ED_75.korean: 미안해 할 거 없어. 도와줘서 고마워 이레이나.

LALALA3ED_76.english: I connected to Leica but it isn’t coming out.

LALALA3ED_78.english: What are you going to do now?

LALALA3ED_81.english: Since Epsilon said it’s fine, there shouldn’t be any major problems.

LALALA3ED_82.korean: - 엡실론이 괜찮다고 말한 이상 큰 문제는 없겠지.
LALALA3ED_82.english: It became clear that if I just waited a few days, she would return to her normal self as if nothing had happened, but…

LALALA3ED_83.korean: - 며칠만 기다리면 아무렇지 않게 평소의 모습으로 돌아올 거라는 게 분명해졌지만…
LALALA3ED_83.english: After all, isn’t it the commander’s job to act proactively in times like this?

LALALA3ED_84.korean: - 역시 이럴 때 적극적으로 행동하는 게 사령관이 해야할 일이 아니겠어?

LALALA3ED_85.english: Huh? What’s wrong? Is it the Demon King?

LALALA3ED_86.english: Can you help me with just one more thing?

LALALA3ED_87.korean: 한 가지만 더 도와줄 수 있어?
LALALA3ED_87.english: I made it exactly as the Demon King told me to… Is this okay?
